{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block title %}{{ form.name.data and 'تعديل' or 'إضافة' }} شريك{% endblock %} {% block content %}

{{ form.name.data and 'تعديل' or 'إضافة' }} شريك

{% if partner %}
{% if partner.balance and partner.balance > 0 %} دفع ({{ '%.2f'|format(partner.balance) }} ₪) {% endif %} دفعات
{% endif %}
{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
الحقول الإجبارية مُعلّمة بـ *
{{ form.name.label(class="form-label fw-bold fs-5") }} {{ form.name(class="form-control form-control-lg form-control-modern shadow-sm" + (' is-invalid' if form.name.errors else ''), placeholder="أدخل اسم الشريك", autofocus=true) }} {% for err in form.name.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
معلومات الاتصال
{{ form.phone_number.label(class="form-label fw-bold") }}
{{ form.phone_number(class="form-control form-control-modern" + (' is-invalid' if form.phone_number.errors else ''), placeholder="05xxxxxxxx") }}
{% for err in form.phone_number.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
{{ form.email.label(class="form-label fw-bold") }}
{{ form.email(class="form-control form-control-modern" + (' is-invalid' if form.email.errors else ''), placeholder="partner@example.com") }}
{% for err in form.email.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
{{ form.identity_number.label(class="form-label fw-bold") }}
{{ form.identity_number(class="form-control form-control-modern", placeholder="رقم الهوية") }}
{% for err in form.identity_number.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
{{ form.contact_info.label(class="form-label fw-bold") }}
{{ form.contact_info(class="form-control form-control-modern", placeholder="معلومات إضافية للتواصل") }}
{% for err in form.contact_info.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
{{ form.address.label(class="form-label fw-bold") }}
{{ form.address(class="form-control form-control-modern", placeholder="العنوان الكامل") }}
{% for err in form.address.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
المعلومات المالية والحصص
{{ form.currency.label(class="form-label fw-bold fs-6") }}
{{ form.currency(class="form-control form-control-lg form-control-modern border-2" + (' is-invalid' if form.currency.errors else ''), style="background: linear-gradient(to right, #fff 0%, #f8f9fa 100%);") }}
{% for err in form.currency.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
{{ form.share_percentage.label(class="form-label fw-bold") }}
{{ form.share_percentage(class="form-control form-control-lg form-control-modern" + (' is-invalid' if form.share_percentage.errors else ''), placeholder="0", step="0.01", min="0", max="100") }} %
{% for err in form.share_percentage.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
{{ form.opening_balance(class="form-control form-control-lg form-control-modern" + (' is-invalid' if form.opening_balance.errors else ''), placeholder="0.00") }} ₪
موجب = له علينا | سالب = عليه لنا {% for err in form.opening_balance.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
{% if partner %}
الرصيد الحالي

{{ '%.2f'|format(partner.net_balance) }} {{ partner.currency or 'ILS' }}

{{ 'له علينا' if partner.net_balance > 0 else ('عليه لنا' if partner.net_balance < 0 else 'متوازن') }}

{% endif %}
{{ form.notes.label(class="form-label fw-bold") }}
{{ form.notes(class="form-control form-control-modern", rows="3", placeholder="ملاحظات إضافية (اختياري)", style="resize: vertical;") }}
{% for err in form.notes.errors %}
{{ err }}
{% endfor %}
